# Helm chart

* compatibility
  * with [Helm](/content/vault/v2.x/content/partials/helm/version.md)
  * with [Kubernetes](/content/vault/v2.x/content/partials/kubernetes-supported-versions.md)
* [source code](https://github.com/hashicorp/vault-helm)
* 👀recommended way to👀
  * install Vault | Kubernetes
  * configure Vault | Kubernetes / integrate -- with -- OTHER services

## how to use?

* if you use AWS features (_Example:_ AWS PrivateLink) / require a network load balancer (NLB) -> BEFORE your application load balancer (ALB), provision your NLB
